name: /pr-source-remove preserves the removed entry record with timestamp in the archive metadata
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro pr-corpus/evidence && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace: [{id: my-src, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 2}]
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && printf 'source_id: my-src
' > pr-corpus/evidence/my-src.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-remove.sh" my-src --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --evidence-dir pr-corpus/evidence --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'removed_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z' pr-corpus/evidence/_archived/my-src-2026-05-13T00-00-00Z.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
